answer:
<think> I know that the movie Gremlins (1984) starred Zach Galligan. I also know that the 1985 movie "Back to the Future" starred Michael J. Fox, who was also in Gremlins. I'm going to look for a connection between the two. Ah, I see that Robert Zemeckis directed both Back to the Future (1985) and Gremlins (1984). Therefore, Robert Zemeckis directed a 1985 movie that starred an actor who was also in Gremlins. </think>
<answer> Robert Zemeckis </answer>
